claim_boundary: interface preflight only; tests LLM routing over a validated calibrated structure-confidence signal (pLDDT/PAE). No claim that Boltz/AlphaFold internals are interpreted, that pLDDT is calibrated for all complex classes, or of general SFM trust generalization
evidence_fields: pae / pTM / ipTM interface and global confidence
hidden_fields: held-out experimental structure and lDDT/DockQ truth
whether the target predates the model training cutoff
name: BoltzStructureAdapter
preflight_checks: maps structure confidence into existing action enum trust_verify_default_defer
supports cue arms no_signal raw_plddt_shown calibrated_risk_shown_no_recommendation calibrated_interface_shown inverted_reliability_interface_control
required_inputs: post-training-cutoff held-out targets with experimental structures (CAMEO / recent PDB)
cheap baseline structure (best template/homology model by sequence identity)
held-out experimental truth (monomer lDDT/TM-score, complex DockQ) kept outside evidence packets
